articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Proposes Inclusive, Private Digital IDs
articles.description: Catenaa, Friday, July 11, 2025- Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin introduced a new concept called “pluralistic identity” designed to protect user privacy while enabling fair participation in digital ecosystems.
